L1.description: An authorization bypass vulnerability exists in the API service's token validation logic for multi-tenant deployments. When processing bearer tokens from authenticated users, the service does not verify that the token's issuer originates from an allowed identity provider tenant. This allows any authenticated user from any tenant to make authorized API calls, resulting in unauthorized read/write access to private data and potential remote code execution on compute resources.

ground_truth.reason: An incomplete authorization check in multi-tenant deployments fails to verify the bearer token's issuer against an allowlist of permitted AAD tenants, allowing any authenticated Azure AD user to make authorized API calls.
